uplink.description: Status report with shock/tamper alarm (motion detected)
uplink._note: Wire shape from the upstream R900NAC3 status-report example (bytes[15]=0x01 shock/tamper alarm); expected.data authored here and produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js to confirm the field layout (Volt 11, Current 11mA, LowCurrent1Alarm 1, ShockTamperAlarm Alarm). Shock maps to action.motion.detected=true.

uplink.description: Status report with no alarm and low battery (motion not detected)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame: bytes[4]=0xA5 sets the low-battery high bit (0x25=37 -> 3.7 V), bytes[15]=0x00 NoAlarm -> action.motion.detected=false. Verified against reference/upstream-codec.js (Volt '3.7(low battery)', Current1 300mA, ShockTamperAlarm NoAlarm).

uplink.description: Device info / startup frame carries no measurement
uplink._note: Device-info frame: bytes[3]=0x00 -> Device/SWver/HWver/Datecode per reference/upstream-codec.js, no measurement. Zero-padded to 16 bytes so it reaches the reportType==0x00 branch (the short 10-byte upstream startup example would trip the length guard first).

uplink.description: Config response on fPort 23 carries no measurement
uplink._note: Upstream ConfigReportRsp example input on fPort 23. Config responses carry no measurement, so our codec rejects the fPort.
